visual_summary: A Grid Pattern Demo is a large full-screen grid component that can display various patterns. It's ideal for showcasing different layouts and designs. A developer would use this component to add visual interest or demonstrate grid-based concepts.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Grid Pattern Demo
Description: A Grid Pattern Demo is a large full-screen grid component that can display various patterns. It's ideal for showcasing different layouts and designs. A developer would use this component to add visual interest or demonstrate grid-based concepts.
Style: full-screen, background-pattern
Interactions: 
Tags: grid, pattern, demo

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
"use client"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
import { GridPattern } from "@/registry/magicui/grid-pattern"

export default function GridPatternDemo() {
  return (
    <div className="bg-background relative flex h-[500px] w-full flex-col items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-lg border">
      <GridPattern
        squares={[
          [4, 4],
          [5, 1],
          [8, 2],
          [5, 3],
          [5, 5],
          [10, 10],
          [12, 15],
          [15, 10],
